title: Quebec City, Quebec — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Quebec City, Quebec: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Quebec City is a city in Quebec with a population of 549,459. A charming historic walled city with European flair, the lowest cost of living among major Canadian cities, and world-famous winter carnival.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
